summary: All mock extraction logic removed. extractDocument now requires real Azure Document Intelligence and runs the full Wave 8 mapping engine pipeline on every code path.
mock_removals: generateMockBlocks() function — deleted (was 30-block ACORD 125 static fixture)
generateMockExtraction() function — deleted (was 4-block simplified mock from prior session)
mock fallback on DI not configured — replaced with 503 Service Unavailable response
mock fallback on DI error — replaced with 500 Internal Server Error propagation

real_pipeline.step1_ocr: Azure Document Intelligence prebuilt-layout model — returns PageExtraction[] with OCR lines, bounding boxes (inch units), page dimensions
real_pipeline.step2_block_build: buildBlocksFromPages() — converts DI lines to typed ExtractedBlock[] with DPI scaling (96 DPI), checkbox/signature/kvp detection
real_pipeline.step4_acord_mapping: mapBlocksWithAcord() — runs Wave 8 multi-stage pipeline: dictionary -> heuristic -> embeddings -> geometry -> category -> fusion -> re-rank
real_pipeline.step5_response: Full semantic extraction returned: pages, blocks, mappings (FieldMapping[] with AcordLabelCandidate[]), fieldTypes, pageDimensions, structuralDelta, summary

error_handling.mapping_engine_failure: Isolated catch — returns stub FieldMapping[] without candidates, logs warning. Designer still shows fields, just without ACORD suggestions.

extractText_status: Already real-only. Throws if DI not configured. No changes needed.
